overview: The Men's Clinic provides physician-supervised testosterone replacement therapy and comprehensive men's health services for patients experiencing low testosterone or andropause. Services include body composition analysis, blood pressure monitoring, nutritional supplements, and hair loss treatment.
highlights: Medically supervised testosterone replacement with injectable and topical options
Body composition analysis using TANITA bioelectrical impedance
VIP member program with partner business discounts and monthly events
targetAudience: Men experiencing symptoms of low testosterone or andropause, typically ages 40 to 60.
